description: Stations generate tiny passengers on a timer. Trains pick up passengers at stations and deliver them to the next station. A delivery counter tracks deliveries. The feature is togglable so sandbox play remains uninterrupted.

tasks.title: Passenger state and toggle
tasks.description: Add passenger delivery state: enabled flag (togglable), per-station passenger arrays (max 3), total delivered counter, high score in localStorage. Add a toggle button (🧑 Passengers) in the controls bar.
changes: Add CSS for passenger toggle button, passenger emoji display at stations, and delivery counter HUD
Add passengerState object in JS: { enabled, stations (keyed by 'row,col' -> count), onboard (keyed by train color -> count), delivered, highScore }
Add localStorage key 'trainTracks_passengers' for high score
Add toggle button that enables/disables the system, saved to localStorage

tasks.title: Passenger spawn at stations
tasks.description: During play, stations generate passengers on a 10-second timer. Max 3 per station. Tiny emoji rendered near station platform.
changes: Add passengerSpawnInterval that runs during play
Each tick, iterate station cells and add a passenger if < 3
Render passenger emoji (🧑) positioned near station platform area
Clean up passengers when play stops

tasks.title: Train picks up passengers at station
tasks.description: When a train arrives at a station cell during animation, pick up waiting passengers. Play boarding sound. Show boarding visual feedback.
changes: In advanceTrainAnim when entering a station cell: check if passengers waiting
Transfer passengers from station to train's onboard count
Play boarding SFX (cheerful ascending 'ding')
Show toast '🧑 Passengers boarding!' and brief visual pulse on station

tasks.title: Train delivers passengers at next station
tasks.description: When a train with onboard passengers arrives at a different station, deliver them. Play disembark sound, show confetti, increment counter.
changes: In advanceTrainAnim when entering a station cell: if train has onboard passengers, deliver them
Increment delivered counter
Play disembark SFX (bright celebration)
Mini confetti burst at station
Show toast '🧑 N passengers delivered!'
Update counter HUD display
Check if new high score, save to localStorage

tasks.title: Delivery counter HUD
tasks.description: Show a small counter in the controls area displaying current deliveries and high score when passenger mode is active.
changes: Add #passenger-hud element shown when passenger mode enabled and playing
Display: '🧑 Delivered: N' and optional 'Best: M' if high score exists
Update on each delivery
Hide when not playing or passenger mode disabled

tasks.title: Sound effects for boarding and delivery
tasks.description: Add SFX.passengerBoard (cheerful ding-ding) and SFX.passengerDeliver (triumphant mini-fanfare).
changes: Add SFX.passengerBoard: quick ascending dings
Add SFX.passengerDeliver: brief celebration fanfare + confetti particles

tasks.title: Share link and save/load compatibility
tasks.description: Passenger state is session-only (not saved with layout). Ensure no regression in share link encoding/decoding.
changes: Passenger delivery state resets on play stop — does not persist to save/load or share links
No changes to share link encoding needed

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Toggle button '🧑' in controls enables/disables passenger mode
AC2: Passengers (emoji 🧑) appear at stations every ~10s during play when enabled, max 3 per station
AC3: Train picks up passengers when arriving at station (boarding sound plays)
AC4: Train delivers passengers at next station (delivery sound + mini confetti)
AC5: Delivery counter shows '🧑 Delivered: N' during play when enabled
AC6: High score saved to localStorage
AC7: Feature can be toggled off for pure sandbox play
AC8: No regression in existing play/stop/crash/loop behavior
AC9: Works in both day and night modes
AC10: Works with multiple trains independently (each train tracks its own passengers)
testing_focus: Toggle passenger mode on/off during non-play state
Play with passengers enabled — watch passenger spawn, pickup, delivery cycle
Multiple trains each picking up at different stations
Stop play and verify passenger state resets cleanly
Night mode appearance of passenger emojis
Save/load doesn't break with passenger state active
Random track generation + play with passengers enabled
